This classification is part of the larger order Asparagales, which includes a variety of flowering plants. At the family level, Arachnorchis serotina shares this classification with approximately 30,000 other species of orchids. intro: Arachnorchis serotina, commonly known as the 'hairy greenhood', is a species of orchid native to the south-west of Western Australia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
